hypothesis: If a MACE model is augmented with gating mechanisms and species-dependent edge features and implemented in JAX, then it will match standard MACE’s energy/force accuracy on SPICE2 while achieving faster inference and 1 ns MD simulation runtimes on H100 GPUs than Torch+ASE and unmodified MACE, because the architectural changes and XLA-optimized execution reduce per-step computational cost without diminishing expressivity.
